sections.paragraph: ἀναϰεφαλαιόω [ἀνά, κεφάλαιον of summation in speech or writing = ‘gist of the matter’] in NT only mid. and pass. sum up, summarize Ro 13:9 (here ἀ. either refers to summation in a single statement or is used in accounting imagery of a column in a ledger); ἀ. τὰ πάντα ἐν τῷ χριστῷ bring everything together in Christ Eph 1:10.
